items.title: Fulu -- Data Availability Sampling Core
items.description: Core DAS specification for Fulu. Defines DataColumnSidecar, MatrixEntry containers, custody groups (NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS=128, CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT=4, SAMPLES_PER_SLOT=8), get_custody_groups, compute_columns_for_custody_group, compute_matrix, and recover_matrix.

items.title: Fulu -- Fork Choice
items.description: Fork choice modification for Fulu. Modifies is_data_available to use column sidecars (retrieve_column_sidecars) instead of blob retrieval, and verifies data column sidecar KZG proofs.
